function S(S)return w[S+(704098-670593)]end for S,L in ipairs({{-1031700-(-1031701);-655663-(-656285)},{970041-970040,1019180+-1018661};{14601-14081,-993490-(-994112)}})do while end end return(function(w,d,F,s,n,Q,m,O,z,j,J,L,t,B,u,P,C,v,N,Y,c,x,f,H)Y,j,L,O,z,v,f,J,B,x,C,P,t,c,u,H,N=function(w,S)local d=u(S)local F=function(F,s)return L(w,{F;s},S,d)end return F end,function()t=(-10216+10217)+t P[t]=823820-823819 return t end,function(L,F,s,n)local zT={}local
